overall.description: Game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a high-speed drive along a futuristic elevated highway. The camera passes holographic billboards and industrial wire fences with a massive yellow numbered tower visible in the background, capturing the dystopian cyberpunk aesthetic with moderate vehicle traffic.

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the elevated highway, passing other vehicles and approaching the large yellow tower

notable_agents.action: large green food truck being passed on the left side of the highway
white sedan driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive yellow industrial tower with black 04 numbering and red warning lights at the top
large advertisement display showing weapon graphics and text
solid metal safety barrier with yellow and black striped pattern
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic elevated highway with the iconic yellow 04 tower dominating the center background. The camera moves forward past a green food truck and other vehicles, with commercial billboards visible on the right side and a solid guardrail on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway safety corridor with wire fencing

events.description: transition from billboard section to wire fence corridor as the solid guardrail ends

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along the highway past the wire fence section

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan overtaking on the right lane

entered.detail: tall metal wire mesh fence with horizontal cables and rusted posts
corroded support columns for the wire fence with orange rust patterns

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a section of highway lined with industrial wire safety fencing on the left. The yellow 04 tower moves to the right background as the camera continues driving, with rusted metal posts visible along the barrier and occasional vehicles passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway advertisement corridor with holographic displays

events.description: entering commercial billboard section featuring DELAMAIN and COMBAT CAB advertisements

agents.ego_description: driving past the sequential billboard advertisements on the left side

entered.detail: yellow and black advertisement for 35 PB COMBAT CAB with target graphics
large black advertisement for DELAMAIN with white text reading LEAVE YOUR PROBLEMS AT THE DOOR
purple and white advertisement with WET DREAM text and EXPLOSIVE EXPERIENCE tagline

segments.scene_description: The highway corridor transitions to a section dominated by large holographic billboards. The camera passes advertisements for COMBAT CAB, DELAMAIN, and WET DREAM in sequence on the left, while the industrial structure remains visible on the right and traffic continues to flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with industrial safety barriers

events.description: exiting billboard section and returning to wire fence corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway with wire fence on the left and industrial structures on the right

entered.detail: returning to the metal wire mesh fence with horizontal cable supports

segments.scene_description: The final segment returns to the industrial wire fence corridor as the commercial billboards pass behind. The camera continues driving along the elevated highway with the yellow 04 tower still visible in the distant right background, maintaining steady speed through the dystopian urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive along a futuristic elevated highway that shifts from an open urban vista into a corridor of industrial fencing and holographic advertisements. It begins with the iconic yellow 04 tower dominating the center background as the camera passes a green food truck and commercial billboards. As the vehicle progresses, the tower drifts toward the right background and the scenery transitions into a stretch lined with rusted metal posts and industrial wire safety fencing. The environment then opens up into a sequence of vibrant holographic billboards for Combat Cab, Delamain, and Wet Dream on the left before the view shifts back to the industrial wire corridor. Finally, the camera maintains a steady speed through the dystopian landscape with the yellow tower remaining a distant landmark on the right.
